title: COPY INTO: Backslash preceding field separator kills import
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_import(a VARCHAR(255), b INT, c FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0, d BOOLEAN NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_import VALUES ('value2\\', 2, NULL, FALSE);
SELECT * FROM test_import WHERE b > 1 AND d IS NOT NULL;
LOAD DATA INFILE '/path/to/data.csv' INTO TABLE test_import FIELDS TERMINATED BY '\\';
key_bug_features: Backslash before field separator disrupts data import
